name: SMS Webinar
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"SMS marketing can substantially improve engagement rates compared to traditional email campaigns, with messages typically opened within minutes of delivery. This webinar helps optimize your mobile messaging strategy by covering compliance requirements, list-building techniques, and proven best practices that can enhance subscriber interaction while maintaining regulatory compliance."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can leverage the strategies and techniques covered in this comprehensive SMS marketing training to streamlines your workflow and improves operational efficiency across your mobile marketing campaigns."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Webinar Recorded On:","bold":true},{"text":" February 4th, 2021"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Listen to the host. Madeleine Kanoza (Product Marketing Manager at Maropost) runs you through how to make the most from your SMS marketing campaigns. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This webinar covers the following:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Why SMS marketing is the MVP of mobile marketing."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Inspiration for their own successful SMS campaigns."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"How to build and grow SMS lists while remaining TCPA and CTIA compliant."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"A demo of Maropost's SMS and mobile keywords functionality."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"SMS Best Practices."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A sneak peek of what's to come for Maropost SMS."},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FNjsr69rSInA%3Fsi%3DOqHhy502cpgCjN9g","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"\n"}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"\n"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"url","url":"https://youtu.be/Njsr69rSInA?si=OqHhy502cpgCjN9g","embedData":{"height":113,"width":200,"photoUrl":"https://i.ytimg.com/vi/Njsr69rSInA/hqdefault.jpg","videoID":"Njsr69rSInA","showRelated":false,"start":0,"url":"https://youtu.be/Njsr69rSInA?si=OqHhy502cpgCjN9g","embedType":"youtube","name":"Increasing Mobile Marketing ROI with SMS","frameSrc":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/Njsr69rSInA?feature=oembed&autoplay=1"}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Related Articles"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"SMS & Multi-Channel:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1126-creating-sms-contact-lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating SMS Contact Lists"}]},{"text":" -
